checkin.journal:
I was not able to sleep after 4 was having a bit of mental issues - luckily managed to gather myself - talk to myself in the mirror and managed to collect positive energy to start the day
Woke up at 4
Managed to talk to myself in mirror 🪞 felt good
Breakfast with Olle
Prepared the stand
Lots of meetings whole day
Was a successful day I believe there were plenty of affiliates trying to get a deal with us - position of stand was a bit so so
Sushi samba dinner all was great probably ate too much he
